nasb.text: that we also may be like all the nations, that our king may judge us and go out before us and fight our battles.”

esv.text: that we also may be like all the nations, and that our king may judge us and go out before us and fight our battles.”

cnv.text: 讓我們也像列國一樣，有自己的王治理我們，帥領我們出征，為我們作戰。”

ccb.text: 这样我们就会像其他国家一样，有王来统治我们，率领我们，为我们作战。”
